items.title: Gen Z Looks to Nepal as a Test Case of Its Hopes
items.summary: Many youth-led protests around the world have failed to bring meaningful change. But in Nepal, a new government is promising to do things differently.

items.title: ‘No one could ever call me anti-women’: Tharoor shares details of conversation with Rijiju
items.summary: The Congress MP also said women are by far the better half of the species — 'Humans 2.0' — and deserve representation in Parliament and in every institution

items.title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire expires this week with no deal in sight
items.summary: After briefly reopening the Strait of Hormuz, Iran has again closed the vital economic waterway, saying it will restrict ships from passing through as long as the U.S. continues...
